summary: First iteration: tested AgentNotary backend (7/7 endpoints pass) and frontend (all data-testid flows verified). Backend media (voiceover.mp3 ~580KB, walkthrough.mp4 ~710KB, hero/repo/terminal PNGs) all serve with correct content-types and valid magic bytes. Frontend renders all 9 sections in order, copy-to-clipboard buttons work (when permission granted), 8 command tabs switch terminal content, walkthrough carousel navigates, audio loads metadata (29.064s) and play/pause toggles, blog has video+terminal+repo images, comparison shows 12 rows x 5 product columns, nav scroll-anchors work via Lenis. No JS console errors with clipboard permission granted.

ui_bugs.issue: navigator.clipboard.writeText is awaited without try/catch. In environments where the Clipboard API is denied (default headless / no user permission, iframes, http contexts), the write rejects with NotAllowedError before setCopied(true) runs, so the button never shows 'copied' AND the unhandled rejection surfaces as a CRA dev-mode 'Uncaught runtime errors' overlay covering the page. Fix: wrap in try/catch (still call setCopied in finally) or fall back to document.execCommand('copy') / hidden textarea.

integration_issues.issue: On programmatic v.load() before the section is in the viewport, the walkthrough-video element transiently reported MEDIA_ERR_SRC_NOT_SUPPORTED (error code 4, readyState 0). The blog-walkthrough-video (same /api/media/walkthrough.mp4 URL) loaded fine and shows 0:29 duration. Backend serves valid MP4 with ftyp box. Likely a race when force-loading; not user-reproducible in normal scroll. Recommend: add an `onError` handler on the <video> with a single retry to gracefully recover.

action_items: Wrap navigator.clipboard.writeText in try/catch in Hero.jsx and Commands.jsx so the 'copied' UI state still toggles and no unhandled rejection is thrown when Clipboard API is denied. Optional fallback: legacy execCommand('copy').
Add an onError fallback / single-retry to <video data-testid=walkthrough-video> to handle the rare programmatic-load race.
critical_code_review_comments: Hero.jsx:9 and Commands.jsx:123 — clipboard writeText not wrapped in try/catch; produces unhandled Promise rejection AND blocks setCopied state in restricted browser contexts.
BlogPost.jsx is 405 lines — borderline but currently fine; if more sections are added, split TerminalBlock and small typographic sub-components into a separate prose primitives file.

server.py /api/media/status returns truthy file size (int) for voiceover/walkthrough but boolean for images; consider unifying to `{exists: bool, size: int}` for each — minor consistency nit, current shape still satisfies the API contract.

success_rate.frontend: 94% (16/17 — clipboard-without-permission edge case fails gracefully degraded)

test_credentials: n/a — no auth on this site
seed_data_creation: None. Pre-cached media in /app/backend/media/ left untouched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py and produce JUnit XML in /app/test_reports/pytest/. Re-run: `pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v`. For frontend re-test, grant Playwright clipboard-read/clipboard-write permission on the origin before testing copy buttons (await page.context.grant_permissions([...], origin=...)). The single open functional bug is unhandled clipboard rejection in Hero.jsx + Commands.jsx — once fixed, the dev error overlay will not appear and copy buttons will toggle to 'copied' even without clipboard permission.
